scripts.dev: NODE_OPTIONS='--use-system-ca' pnpm --filter @cipherscope/proto build && pnpm --filter @cipherscope/sdk build && concurrently -k -n agent,ui -c green,blue "pnpm --filter @cipherscope/agent dev" "pnpm --filter @cipherscope/ui dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @cipherscope/proto build && pnpm --filter @cipherscope/sdk build && pnpm --filter @cipherscope/ui build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @cipherscope/proto build && pnpm --filter @cipherscope/sdk build && pnpm -r --if-present test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @cipherscope/proto build && pnpm --filter @cipherscope/sdk build && pnpm -r --if-present typecheck
